latest.title: NATO tensions are ‘growing pains,’ U.S. ambassador says as Trump presses allies
latest.summary: U.S. Ambassador to NATO Matthew Whitaker said NATO's allies boosting defense spending under pressure from Trump reflects “growing pains,” not a crisis.
latest.details: Ambassador to NATO Matthew Whitaker said NATO's allies boosting defense spending under pressure from Trump reflects “growing pains,” not a crisis.

latest.title: Typhoon Maysak kills two and forces thousands to evacuate in China
latest.summary: Tropical storm causes extreme flooding in south of the country with heavy rainfall expected in coming days A tropical storm has killed two people,…
latest.details: Tropical storm causes extreme flooding in south of the country with heavy rainfall expected in coming days A tropical storm has killed two people, caused dam breaches and forced tens of thousands to evacuate in southern China Typhoon Maysak killed two people in Nanning, in China’s southern Guangxi province. Maysak – which lashed Vietnam and China’s southern island province of Hainan over the weekend – will dump the water it sucked up on its way ⁠across the South China Sea as it weakens and heads inland, meteorologists say.

radar.title: Belgium loses appeal of Balogun eligibility after Trump defends intervention with FIFA
radar.summary: FIFA reversed Folarin Balogun’s suspension after Trump sought a review, letting the U.S. striker play Belgium as officials objected.
radar.details: FIFA reversed Folarin Balogun’s suspension after Trump sought a review, letting the U. striker play Belgium as officials objected.

radar.title: Cuba suffers third nationwide blackout in six months
radar.summary: Impoverished island was already struggling to keep the lights on before the US imposed a blockade in January Cuba on Monday suffered its third…
radar.details: Impoverished island was already struggling to keep the lights on before the US imposed a blockade in January Cuba on Monday suffered its third nationwide power outage since the start of the year, the state electricity company said. The impoverished island was already struggling to keep the lights on before the US president, Donald Trump, imposed an oil blockade in January, which has depleted the already dwindling supply of fuel for Cuba’s power plants.

radar.title: Charlie Kirk's family attends hearing for suspect charged with his murder
radar.summary: Tyler Robinson, 23, is accused of murdering Kirk, a key Trump ally and founder of youth organisation Turning Point USA.

radar.title: Microsoft cuts 4,800 jobs, as Xbox unit downsizes and plans to spin off four gaming studios
radar.summary: Microsoft is cutting jobs in its commercial business and its Xbox gaming group, where revenue has been shrinking.
radar.details: Microsoft is cutting jobs in its commercial business and its Xbox gaming group, where revenue has been shrinking.
